title: Kamikaze Survivors
description:
Kamikaze Survivors is a top-down Roguelike where players command, equip, and level up battleships from WW1 to the present day. Participate in the First Blitz on London, Pearl Harbor, and Operation Epic Fury and command history's most famous warships including the Dreadnought, North Carolina, Iowa, Yamato, Arleigh Burke, and many others. 

The player will pilot the warship through hostile waters while sailors operate the weapons. Manage the sailor's training and supplies to keep them alive for as long as possible.

Gain turrets before waves of enemy drones, planes, jets, warships, and airships can overwhelm your defenses. Arm your highly automated mobile bastion with a wide array of historic naval guns, missile launchers, drone swarms, and futuristic energy weapons as you collect power ups, underway replenishment, lifeboats, and space capsules to further increase your might to the point it becomes ridiculous. 

Cook up unique builds for sheer power, historic accuracy, or outrageous fun in competition for the worldwide high score.
description_short: Kamikaze Survivors is a top-down Roguelike where players command, equip, and level up battleships from WW1 to the present day. Participate in the First Blitz on London, Pearl Harbor, and Operation Epic Fury in command of history's most famous warships.
